description: Add company name title boost (+25) to ranker. REGRESSION: MongoDB FP returned (company name boost pushed CVE article higher), precision dropped to 88.9%. Latency spike from OpenRouter.

asi.hypothesis: Add company name title boost (+25) to ranker to prioritize company-relevant articles
asi.result: REGRESSION -- MongoDB FP returned, precision dropped to 88.9%
asi.mongodb_fp: Company name boost pushed MongoDB CVE article higher in rank, getting scraped and validated as breach
asi.latency_spike: 45s avg from OpenRouter flakiness, not related to code change
asi.rollback_reason: Company name boost surfaces CVE articles that name the company in title, reintroducing the MongoDB FP. The ranker was not the bottleneck.
asi.next_action_hint: Revert ranker change. Different approach: reduce max_full_extraction_candidates from 8 to 6 (saves 2 scrapes but risks recall)
